sections.description: Gateway is a WordPress plugin for collection registry and data management with React-based admin interfaces.
sections.changelog:
1.3.0 May 8, 2026

  • Added SureCart licensing integration.

1.2.3-rc2 May 6, 2026

  • Fixed setPackageCollections to sync package_key on each collection.
  • Added label_field column on collection table.

1.2.2 – May 5, 2026

  • Stable release.
